rationales.hook_strength: 'The mineral your immune system runs on' is decent but vague — doesn't name zinc or give a concrete payoff that stops a scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide covers one idea and the food-first message is consistent, though 'quiet workhorse' slide adds little beyond the cover.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 20–35s can act on the food list immediately, and the 'demand goes up' slide speaks directly to the training/plant-based crowd.
rationales.novelty: Zinc + oysters + pumpkin seeds is one of the most recycled nutrition carousel formats on TikTok — nothing here reframes it.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged throughout ('may help', 'can support' implied), no hype words, CTA ties directly to the Health Score feature without AI-cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: Solid save bait for nutrition completists but the generic angle limits viral spread — expect average saves, below-average shares.
